name: Easy Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Red pepper flakes, if desired (or a little jalapeno pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet that is about 12 inches wide.
2. Peel and chop onion. Add to the skillet and cook on medium heat as you peel and mince garlic. Add garlic; stir.
3. Cook several more minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft and have released their moisture.
4. Stir in oregano, basil, red pepper flakes, and crushed tomatoes. Simmer uncovered.
5. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water (about 4-6 quarts) to a boil. Add the vermicelli and cook until just tender, about 2 minutes less than package instructions. Drain without rinsing.
6. Toss pasta with sauce and serve on plates. Top with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve with carrot sticks and warmed bread.
